name: Archivist Salenne
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, mage archivist with crystal ball glow on face, scrolls and candle smoke, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you brought the city its sight, then listen carefully—because sight is useless without action.

nodes.text:
The ball shows three threats:

1) Fire at the granary.
2) Breach attempt at the postern.
3) Knifers in the drains.

And one more thing: a city hand delivering wax-sealed orders to the enemy.

A ring. Black wax. A courier’s seal used from inside our walls.

name: Councilor Vayne
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, councilor with tired eyes, crystal glow reflected in ringed fingers, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: Choose what we save. Choose what we lose. That is leadership.

nodes.text:
We cannot stop all three strikes.

Pick your priority:
- Granary (food and winter).
- Postern (a door into the city).
- Command tent (cut the head, risk the body).

And while you do… find the traitor.

name: Master of Stores Rell
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, quartermaster in ledger room, keys at belt, wary expression, lantern light, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you need supplies, file a request like everyone else—oh, you don’t have time. No one does.

nodes.text:
Requisitions? Wax seals? I stamp what the council authorizes.

Unless… someone has a seal they shouldn’t.
